businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform — transforming from defense/intelligence core partner to commercial AI powerhouse
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds software platforms that analyze and integrate complex data. Since launching AIP (AI Platform), commercial growth has been explosive. Q4 2025 revenue $1.407B (+70% YoY), US commercial revenue $507M (+137% YoY). Closed at $153.19 (+4.06%) on 3/4. Surging on defense AI demand amid Middle East military conflict. Rosenblatt raised target to $200. P/E 243.16x, Forward P/E 115.90x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: US DoD, CIA, NSA national security software licenses and maintenance
Commercial: AIP-based enterprise AI analytics platform subscriptions — US commercial revenue +137% YoY
International government: NATO allies and Five Eyes partner government contracts
keyProducts: AIP (AI Platform): Connects LLMs to enterprise data for AI analytics
Gotham: Government/defense data analysis and decision support
Foundry: Enterprise data integration and analytics platform
Apollo: Software deployment and management automation
Maven: US DoD AI operations support system

keyMetrics.interpretation: Q4 2025 $1.407B. Hyper-growth driven by AIP acceleration

keyMetrics.interpretation: Strong profitability for a software platform

growthDrivers.title: Middle East conflict → defense AI surge, +4.06% rally
growthDrivers.description: Escalating Middle East military conflict driving defense stock rally. Palantir leading alongside Lockheed Martin. Gotham/Maven demand increase expected.

growthDrivers.title: Rosenblatt raises target to $200 (from $150)
growthDrivers.description: On 3/3, Rosenblatt Securities maintained Buy and raised target by 33% to $200, reflecting accelerating AI defense demand.

growthDrivers.title: Motley Fool: 2026 guidance could supercharge growth
growthDrivers.description: Record Q4 results and AIP commercial acceleration repositioning 2026 outlook. Total contract bookings $4.26B.

growthDrivers.title: AIP commercial adoption accelerating — US commercial revenue $507M (+137% YoY)
growthDrivers.description: AIP boot camps driving enterprise customer conversion. Q4 US commercial revenue $507M is 137% growth.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Top Secret/SCI government security clearances, 20-year defense/intelligence relationships, and AIP enterprise expansion are core moats.

moats.description: Top Secret/SCI certified. Extremely high barrier to competitor entry.
Gotham/Foundry deeply integrated into customer data infrastructure. Very high replacement costs.
AIP boot camps rapidly expanding enterprise customers. More usage → better models.

competitors.detail: Lakehouse platform competing in AI/ML workloads

competitors.detail: Azure AI services targeting government and enterprise markets

competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform, much smaller scale than PLTR

analystOpinions.notableComment: Buy consensus among 21 analysts. Rosenblatt $200 upgrade. Citigroup $260 highest target. +23% upside from current price.

risks.title: Extreme valuation — P/E 243x
risks.description: Significant correction risk if growth decelerates. PEG 2.49 in overvalued territory.

risks.title: Government budget dependency
risks.description: High US government contract exposure. Vulnerable to budget cuts or policy changes.

risks.title: CEO insider selling
risks.description: Alex Karp's continued stock sales negatively impacting market sentiment.

risks.title: Commercial competition intensifying
risks.description: Competition from Snowflake, Databricks, Microsoft Azure AI.

risks.title: Share dilution
risks.description: SBC driving 4.67% annual share count increase. Diluting existing shareholders.

buyReasons.title: Defense AI beneficiary — Middle East conflict accelerator
buyReasons.rationale: Military conflict escalation expanding defense AI budgets. Palantir's core beneficiary area.

buyReasons.title: US commercial revenue +137% YoY explosion
buyReasons.rationale: AIP boot camp enterprise conversion accelerating. Growth sustainability being validated.

buyReasons.title: Rosenblatt $200 upgrade — momentum catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Major analyst upgrade improving market sentiment.

buyReasons.title: Net cash $6.95B — financial fortress
buyReasons.rationale: Debt-free with ample cash. Aggressive investment and acquisition capacity.

overallOpinion: Palantir surged +4.06% on defense AI demand expectations amid Middle East conflict. Now on a five-day winning streak.
US commercial revenue +137% YoY and total bookings of $4.26B demonstrate overwhelming growth momentum.
However, P/E 243x and PEG 2.49 remain extreme. Sharp correction risk if growth decelerates.
Trading below both 50-day and 200-day MAs but RSI 57.9 shows upward momentum. Rosenblatt $200 upgrade is the near-term catalyst.
